purpose: This repository provides the database model and context for the Cos Lending Selling system, which appears to be a financial lending and loan servicing platform. It defines the data entities, relationships, and database interactions required to support loan management, interest calculations, fee processing, and investor operations.
businessFeatures: Loan transfer and selling to investors

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a financial loan with its associated details and status

dataEntities.name: LoanAccount
dataEntities.description: Links loans to accounts for financial tracking

dataEntities.name: Account
dataEntities.description: Represents a financial account in the system

dataEntities.name: Transfer
dataEntities.description: Represents the transfer of a loan between parties

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Represents a legal agreement between parties

dataEntities.name: InterestHistory
dataEntities.description: Tracks historical interest calculations for loans

dataEntities.name: Investor
dataEntities.description: Represents entities that invest in or purchase loans

dataEntities.name: Fee
dataEntities.description: Represents fees charged in loan transactions

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Groups related operations for processing together

dataEntities.name: Mpl
dataEntities.description: Marketplace lending entity that originates loans

dataEntities.name: Bank
dataEntities.description: Financial institution entity involved in lending

dataEntities.name: Servicing
dataEntities.description: Represents loan servicing operations and status

dataEntities.name: Sofr
dataEntities.description: Secured Overnight Financing Rate data for interest calculations

messagingPatterns.name: TransferOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for loan transfer events

messagingPatterns.name: FeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for fee-related events

messagingPatterns.name: BatchInitOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for batch initialization events

messagingPatterns.name: DailyInterestOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for daily interest calculation events

messagingPatterns.name: MaturedLoanOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for loan maturity events

messagingPatterns.name: NotificationOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for notification events

messagingPatterns.name: ReportingOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for reporting events

messagingPatterns.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for volume fee adjustments

messagingPatterns.name: VolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures reliable message delivery for volume fee events

findings.title: Outbox Pattern Implementation Risk
findings.description: The repository uses multiple outbox tables with corresponding dead letter tables but lacks visible processing or retry logic, risking message loss during system failures. Implement comprehensive outbox message processing with monitoring and alerting.
